headline: Darling Ingredients Up 84.3% in 6 Months: What's Driving the Stock?
summary: DAR stock has surged 84% in six months as renewable diesel margins recover, earnings rebound and operational momentum strengthens.

headline: Trump Reportedly Freezes Beef Tariff Rollback After Rancher Revolt— 'No Doubt An Experiment'
summary: Trump delays beef tariff suspension plan after ranchers warn cheaper imports could hurt U.S. cattle producers.
